steps.description: Click the input field labeled "Type a message" located at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground page.
Type text: 'Hi' in the input field at the bottom of the chat interface within the "Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" application.
Press the Enter key to submit the text input in the message box of the "Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" chat interface.
@assertion bot reply message: "[1] you said: Hi" or "You said: Hi" exist.
